69cd62bf473d11f1646c2269 description:
Brother, soldier, merc... welcome back to Tarkov, friend. Much has happened since you left. There are many new faces in town. You may have seen some of them in the contacts dossier I gave you. You'll get your chance to meet them in due time.
First, I need you to scout out the old Customs area. Just don't lose your head. We've got a long road ahead of us.
69cd62bf473d11f1646c2269 successMessageT: Two balls, one head. Yup, same you. Thanks for taking a look.
69cd770045b0c8b5f47878a4 description: First things first. We need to clear out the perimeter from some of the less friendly faces in town. Start by taking out 5 of the locals. That should send them running.
69cd770045b0c8b5f47878a4 successMessageT: It's so quiet without all that chatter. I can almost hear myself think.
69cd7b7345b0c8b5f47878ae description:
Now that we have food to eat, beer to drink, and can hear ourselves taking a shit, I've been thinking about this whole Terragroup situation. They corrupt everything they touch, it seems, and Tarkov was no exception.
I need you to check out if these papers I heard about are legit. Heard it through the local wire.
No, dipshit, they don't use Facebook Messenger. They meet face-to-face, like real men. Besides, infrastructure out here is spotty. Just what did you spend your time doing back on the mainland, anyways?
69cd7b7345b0c8b5f47878ae successMessageT: Thanks. Seems legit, though it's barely legible.
69cd7bf545b0c8b5f47878b3 description:
The same guy that told me about those documents has another job for us. Should be straightforward enough. He wants you to merc a few of those mercs that have been bumming around, doesn't care where.
Oh, not funny huh? My bad. Fuck me for trying. Get out there champ.
69cd7bf545b0c8b5f47878b3 successMessageT: Great. Got another number passed along. Said he's got some work for us.
69cd7c9645b0c8b5f47878ba description: You remember sitting by that boat on Shoreline? One of those dismal summer days, bottle of vodka and a pack of smokes? Life doesn't get better than that. I'm not saying we could relive that, but... well, it's worth a shot, isn't it?
69cd7c9645b0c8b5f47878ba successMessageT: Grab the matches. I'll meet you outside in ten.
69ce8e2896b54ce3c6d1fa2d description: You know the drill. Grab me a couple parts I can use on these scav guns. I think you'll find a lot of nice stuff, rummaging around through what's left of Tarkov.
69ce8e2896b54ce3c6d1fa2d successMessageT: Just look at the detail on this toolset. They sure don't make them like they used to.
69cedc2dd2a219c316eb1c1e description:
You know how I mentioned there's a few new faces in town? I've got a real piece of work for you. This kid Atlas, not his real name but whatever, says he wants to meet you. Wants to know if the stories about you are true. You're like, his idol, dude. Just be careful around him. He's got a couple screws loose. Anyways, as it goes around here, I figure if you're going to make the trip out to meet him, it's worth bringing him a few gestures of good will.
He's a bit of a gun nut, so grab a few parts for him, will ya? Also, he said he's always in need of new workbenches. Mark a few of the run-down ones, if you could.
69cedc2dd2a219c316eb1c1e successMessageT: I can't help but think you two are made for each other.
69ceddc2d2a219c316eb1c26: Find the weapons bench on Ground Zero
69cede0fd2a219c316eb1c2c: Find the machine gun overlooking the construction site on Customs
69cedf01e4cc2cc2742682e2 description: One more request for our friend before you head out. This one's a doozy. Atlas told me about this crazy old guy who got his Legs blown off, few years back. Said he needed a specific couple of weapons to make a memorial for him. Two ADARs, one M4, and he was very specific about no modifications, he said not to even touch 'em. Beats me whatever the hell he was talking about. Say, weren't you in Tarkov back then?
69cedf01e4cc2cc2742682e2 successMessageT: You managed to find them? Here's his coordinates. Have fun!
69cee1057c3c785e39999475 description: Next up on your friends list is a Chinese emissary, Xiaoming. I don't really know much about him, unfortunately. He's a hard read but he let me know that any information about Terragroup he would make our while. See if you can find any of them lying around and I'll send you his way.
69cee1057c3c785e39999475 successMessageT: What, a white boy can't speak a little Chinese?
69cee2f77c3c785e39999479: Hand over intelligence folder in raid
69cee334142467411393bf91 description: Crackhead alert! You can probably guess what this guy wants. On your toes!
69cee334142467411393bf91 successMessageT: I'm not even sure what to say on this one.
